mapper.select: SELECT sp.id, sp.product_id AS productId, sp.seckill_price AS seckillPrice, sp.seckill_stock AS seckillStock, sp.status, DATE_FORMAT(sp.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(sp.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS endTime, p.name, p.description, p.image AS imageUrl FROM seckill_product sp LEFT JOIN product p ON sp.product_id = p.id WHERE sp.status IN (0, 1) AND sp.start_time <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND sp.end_time > NOW() ORDER BY sp.start_time ASC
